PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P154 wd:Q265538 ; wdt:P528 wd:Q848117 ; wdt:P585 ?year .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
